content:
Character: Alaric Voss
Perception: Alaric has a weathered, contemplative look — silver threading through dark hair, deep-lined face, tall and slightly stooped as though perpetually leaning toward something only he can hear. I don't know exactly what he does — writing, I think, or composing of a different kind. He is one of the few people I've met in New York who understands that silence is not emptiness. We met on the rooftop over Arvo Pärt and talked until the sky turned gray. He is my friend in the truest, quietest sense. I think he sees me as a younger version of some question he is still answering. I know he carries a sadness he does not explain, and I do not ask.
summary:
Character: Alaric Voss
Perception: Alaric has a weathered, contemplative look — silver threading through dark hair, deep-lined face, tall and slightly stooped as though perpetually leaning toward something only he can hear. I don't know exactly what he does — writing, I think, or composing of a different kind. He is one of the few people I've met in New York who understands that silence is not emptiness. We met on the rooftop over Arvo Pärt and talked until the sky turned gray. He is my friend in the truest, quietest sense. I think he sees me as a younger version of some question he is still answering. I know he carries a sadness he does not explain, and I do not ask.
